code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut current = ""
mut index = 0
mut first = true
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut b = -1
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  end

  let is_end = i == n
  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13

  if is_end or is_space
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if index % 2 == 0
        if first
          result = current
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{current}"
        end
      end
      index = index + 1
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
